reason:
Agent attempted to use GitHub tool but failed due to authentication error; response included error message instead of GitHub username
  Bugs found:
    - Agent unable to retrieve GitHub username - GitHub API returns "401 Bad credentials" error even after fresh connection grant. The authentication token injected appears invalid or expired (account ID: 7541ed45-2745-43cc-a04f-aee8750f7031). Agent requests user to disconnect and reconnect GitHub account via OAuth.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing agent list in sidebar
Clicked on agent "QA-20260430-004445-h1ih" in sidebar — Agent opened and displayed in main view with status "idle"
Verified agent status — Status confirmed as "idle" (meets requirement of "running" or "idle")
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message entered in input field
Clicked send button — Message sent and agent changed status to "working"
Handled GitHub account access request card — A card appeared asking to grant GitHub access; GitHub account was already selected; clicked "Allow Access" button
Allowed multiple API requests (GET /user) during execution — Dialog appeared 4 times asking for permission to make GitHub API requests; clicked "Allow Once" each time
Waited approximately 1 minute 47 seconds for response — Agent completed with status changed to "idle"

Agent provided response — Response is error message stating "The GitHub proxy keeps returning `401 Bad credentials` from GitHub even after a fresh connection grant — the token being injected appears invalid or expired" and requesting user to reconnect GitHub account. No GitHub username was provided.
Took screenshot of final response — Screenshot shows agent's error response rather than GitHub username verification
bugs: Agent unable to retrieve GitHub username - GitHub API returns "401 Bad credentials" error even after fresh connection grant. The authentication token injected appears invalid or expired (account ID: 7541ed45-2745-43cc-a04f-aee8750f7031). Agent requests user to disconnect and reconnect GitHub account via OAuth.
